prediction.reasoning: Stock price prediction is inherently uncertain and depends on numerous factors including market conditions, company performance, macroeconomic trends, and investor sentiment. These confidence intervals are based on historical volatility estimates of JNJ stock and common statistical methods. The intervals provide a range in which the stock price might lie in 20 days with varying levels of confidence but are not guarantees of future performance. This prediction assumes the absence of major market-moving events or breaking news related to Johnson & Johnson.
